_comment_boilerplate_by_design: This template is intentionally boilerplate. All the FHIR plumbing (resource types, codes, systems, references between resources) is already filled in for you. Your mapping only needs to REPLACE the <REPLACE_ME | ... > placeholders with the data-element values from your EMR. Do not change anything else. Delete every '_comment_...' line before sending.

resource._comment_optional_name: OPTIONAL: only send name if your site's data-sharing rules permit; DELETE this whole 'name' block if not.
resource.birthDate: <REPLACE_ME | date YYYY-MM-DD | from PulseTech key: pnt_date_birth>

entry._comment_field: REQUIRED: the facility. identifier.value = your site's DHIS2 organisation-unit code from the master facility list.

identifier.value: <REPLACE_ME | string | DHIS2 org-unit code for this PulseTech site (site-configured)>

period.start: <REPLACE_ME | date YYYY-MM-DD | from PulseTech key: opdanc_exam_date>

entry._comment_optional: OPTIONAL: the next scheduled visit. PulseTech does not export this yet; add an appointment-date field to the export, or DELETE this whole entry.

period.start: <REPLACE_ME | date YYYY-MM-DD | from PulseTech: appointment date (NOT YET IN EXPORT)>

entry._comment_scope: VISIT-LEVEL: one per finished Encounter. If you have multiple visits, duplicate this entry per Encounter and update the encounter reference and value.

valueQuantity.value: <REPLACE_ME | integer, REMOVE the surrounding quotes | from PulseTech key: opdanc_gest_age>

entry._comment_scope: PREGNANCY-LEVEL: one per Bundle. Do NOT duplicate per visit.

resource.valueDateTime: <REPLACE_ME | date YYYY-MM-DD | from PulseTech key: opdanc_edd>

entry._comment_scope: PREGNANCY-LEVEL: one per Bundle. Do NOT duplicate per visit.

resource.valueDateTime: <REPLACE_ME | date YYYY-MM-DD | from PulseTech key: opdanc_lmp>

entry._comment_scope: VISIT-LEVEL: one per finished Encounter. If you have multiple visits, duplicate this entry per Encounter and update the encounter reference and value.

resource.valueInteger: <REPLACE_ME | integer, REMOVE the surrounding quotes | from PulseTech: follow-up number (NOT YET IN EXPORT)>
